data.title: Delaware Life Insurance Company in the United States has partnered with BlackRock to launch an FIA product with Bitcoin exposure.
data.description: Delaware Life Insurance Company announced the addition of the BlackRock U.S. Equity Bitcoin Balanced Risk 12% Index to its Fixed Indexed Annuity (FIA) portfolio. This index, offered through the iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT), provides Bitcoin investment exposure, combining U.S. stocks and Bitcoin, targeting a volatility of 12%, and protecting the principal of the fixed indexed annuity. (stocktitan)

It is currently trading at US$17.54 million, with a 24-hour increase of 156.9%. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin fluctuates greatly, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Experiences Narrowing Losses
data.description: U.S. stock indices have seen a reduction in losses, with the S&P 500 index declining by 1% and the Nasdaq index falling by 1.3%. According to ChainCatcher, these adjustments come amid fluctuating market conditions. The changes reflect ongoing volatility in the financial markets.

data.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Adds $108 Million in Ethereum, But BMNR Dives Amid Trade War Turmoil
data.description:
Ethereum treasury firm BitMine added $108 million last week, but its stock is down as markets react to President Trump's latest tariff threats.
source: https://decrypt.co/355134/tom-lees-bitmine-adds-108-million-ethereum-stock-dives-amid-trade-war-turmoil

data.title: Silver Hits Record High, Surpassing Nvidia's Market Cap
data.description: Silver has achieved a record price of $95, elevating its market capitalization to $5.3 trillion, surpassing Nvidia's valuation of $4.53 trillion. According to NS3.AI, investors are increasingly turning to precious metals such as silver and gold as secure investments in response to ongoing geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainties. Meanwhile, the cryptocurrency market, including Bitcoin, has experienced a downturn. However, there is potential for a reversal with anticipated liquidity injections from the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Chainlink Integrates Equities Data to Enhance DeFi Access to Traditional Finance
data.description: Chainlink has announced the integration of 24/5 equities data, aiming to bring the $80 trillion U.S. stock market onchain. According to BWEnews, this development is expected to enhance decentralized finance (DeFi) access to traditional financial markets. The integration allows for more seamless interaction between blockchain technology and conventional finance, potentially broadening the scope and functionality of DeFi applications. This move is seen as a significant step towards bridging the gap between digital and traditional financial systems, offering new opportunities for innovation and growth in the financial sector.

data.title: Analysis: A suspected insider address accurately purchased the corresponding tokens twice before the Binance Alpha launch.
data.description: On-chain data shows that a suspected insider address made large purchases of the corresponding tokens twice before their listing on Binance Alpha. On December 10, 2025, at 2:19 PM, this address purchased 7 BNB DOYR; DOYR was listed on Binance Alpha at 2:22 PM. On January 20, 2026, at 11:09 PM, this address purchased 20 BNB 克克马 (a token), and 克克马 was listed on Binance Alpha at 11:11 PM.

data.title: Chorus One and Ledger Enterprise Collaborate on Institutional Staking Solutions
data.description: Chorus One has announced a partnership with Ledger Enterprise to offer institutions self-custodial staking options for Ethereum, Solana, Polkadot, and Tezos. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration enables institutions to earn staking rewards while retaining full governance control. The integration combines Ledger’s hardware and governance controls with Chorus One's validator infrastructure, focusing on security and compliance for institutional users. This initiative highlights the increasing interest among institutions in staking as a secure revenue stream within crypto custody frameworks.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 2,886 BTC, while the Ethereum ETF experienced a net outflow of 0.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 2,886 BTC, while the Ethereum ETF and Solana ETF saw a net outflow of 0.

data.title: Bitmine has secured investor support to expand its share cap, but will not immediately issue new shares.
data.description: Ethereum treasury company Bitmine Immersion Technologies has received shareholder approval to expand its authorized shareholding. The proposal garnered 81% approval. However, the proposal does not mean an immediate issuance of new shares, but rather increases the upper limit on the number of shares the company can issue in the future. Currently, Bitmine holds 4.203 million ETH (approximately 3.5% of the circulating supply), 193 BTC, and a $22 million stake in Eightco Holdings, in addition to nearly $1 billion in cash. Furthermore, Bitmine has staked approximately 1.83 million ETH, resulting in an overall Ethereum staking ratio of 2.83%, and recently invested $200 million in Beast Industries, demonstrating its ETH accumulation and diversification strategy. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Citigroup CEO Highlights Importance of Federal Reserve's Independence
data.description: The CEO of Citigroup emphasized the critical role of the Federal Reserve's independence in maintaining the global leadership of the U.S. financial system. According to Odaily, the CEO expressed confidence that U.S. assets will not be relocated and advised against betting on the failure of American entrepreneurs and consumers.

data.title: CFTC Chairman Introduces 'Future Proof' Program for Digital Asset Regulation
data.description: Michael Selig, the newly appointed Chairman of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), has announced the launch of the 'Future Proof' program aimed at modernizing regulations for digital assets. According to NS3.AI, this initiative seeks to reassess outdated rules originally intended for agricultural futures and introduce the minimum necessary regulations to encourage innovation in the digital asset sector. The CFTC is also preparing to expand its role should Congress enact new legislation concerning the digital asset market structure, with the goal of maintaining the competitiveness of U.S. markets.

data.title: Russia Proposes Fines for Illegal Cryptocurrency Mining
data.description: A deputy in Russia's State Duma has put forward a draft bill suggesting fines for illegal cryptocurrency mining activities. According to NS3.AI, the proposed penalties include fines ranging from 100,000 to 150,000 rubles for individuals, 300,000 to 800,000 rubles for public officials, and 1 million to 2 million rubles for legal entities. This initiative seeks to regulate unauthorized crypto mining within the country.

data.title: Tether Reduces Circulating Supply by Burning 3 Billion USDT
data.description: Tether's Treasury has executed a significant reduction in its circulating supply by burning 3 billion USDT. According to NS3.AI, this action was confirmed by Whale Alert and signifies a contraction in Tether's total outstanding tokens. This development may influence the stablecoin market and highlights Tether's continuous efforts in managing its supply.

data.title: U.S. Treasury to Include Seized Bitcoin in Digital Asset Reserves
data.description: The U.S. Treasury Department has announced plans to incorporate seized Bitcoin into the government's digital asset reserves. According to ChainCatcher, this decision was reported by CoinDesk and marks a significant step in the government's approach to managing digital currencies. The move reflects an evolving strategy towards the integration of cryptocurrencies within official financial frameworks.

data.title: Citigroup CEO: Federal Reserve Independence is Crucial
data.description: The CEO of Citigroup stated that the Federal Reserve's independence is crucial for maintaining the leading position of our financial system globally, and he does not believe that American assets will be transferred; he also emphasized that we should never bet on the failure of American entrepreneurs and consumers. (Jinshi)

data.title: The U.S. Supreme Court did not rule on the legality challenge to Trump's global tariffs.
data.description: The U.S. Supreme Court did not rule on the challenge to the legitimacy of Trump's global tariffs. (Jinshi)

data.title: BNB Drops Below 900 USDT with a 3.03% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 20, 2026, 15:10 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 900 USDT and is now trading at 897.559998 USDT, with a narrowed 3.03% decrease in 24 hours.
